phases.instruction:
Click on highlighted tiles to move.
Tiles must have matching openings to connect.
Try to reach the stairs to the next level.

Click your character to rotate the tile beneath you.
Rotating will also damage the surrounding tiles.
Rotate to open a path forward.

Click the arrow to push a tile into the maze.
This shifts the entire row or column.

Move onto enemies to attack them.
Your ATK vs their DEF determines damage.

Right-click items for options.
Equip the spatula to boost ATK, then defeat the enemy.

Badly damaged tiles are dangerous - you may fall through!
Use CEMENT to repair adjacent tiles, then cross safely.

Equip the pickaxe first!
Then bump into walls 3 times to break through.
Click the blocked tile repeatedly.

You're ready!

Navigate through 10 dungeon levels.
Reach the exit stairs to ascend.
Defeat the King in the final room.
Escape to victory!

Reach the exit to start the game!
